TC_AGREE: I agree to the Station Operator Terms and Conditions.
TC_CERTIFY: I certify that the station coordinates and specifications are accurate.
DRIVER_DASHBOARD_SUBTITLE: Real-time status of your vehicle's SoC, remaining range, and active session
CHARGER_FINDER_SUBTITLE: Find and navigate to interoperable fast-chargers near your location
UNIFIED_WALLET_SUBTITLE: Manage pre-funded wallet balances and unified payment methods across operators
ECO_BATTERY_SUBTITLE: Track your carbon offset, fuel savings, and battery health history
GRID_OPS_SUBTITLE: Live grid load factor, active charging speed metrics, and router statuses
INTEROP_MAP_SUBTITLE: Geospatial tracking of Bengaluru EV grid nodes and active connector availability
OCPP_TERMINAL_SUBTITLE: Examine raw charging communications, standard telemetry, and remote reset frames
WALLET_LEDGER_SUBTITLE: Audit centralized wallet pool balances, provider distributions, and settlements
BATTERY_ANALYTICS_SUBTITLE: Analyze electrochemical SOH degradation and grid battery life passport predictions
PROBLEM_STATEMENT: Problem Statement: Design solutions to enable a connected, interoperable, and reliable EV charging ecosystem that delivers a seamless and user-friendly experience across networks and platforms.
FOCUS_1_DESC: Multi-network Map (Tata, Zeon, ChargeZone, Bolt) with individual Gun-level status feeds.
FOCUS_2_DESC: Live OCPP 2.0.1 monitor, offline Flash buffer backup, & Smart Grid peak-load throttling simulator.
FOCUS_3_DESC: ISO 15118 crypt Plug & Charge and unified settlement ledger with cross-operator wallet balance.
FOCUS_4_DESC: HTML5 Live Geolocation tracking, nearby Petrol Pump EV hub synthesis, and dynamic routing.
READY_EVALUATION: Ready for evaluation (Correctness & Performance: 30% | UX & Design: 10%)
DASHBOARD_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Enhances the driver companion journey by utilizing AI/data integrations. Combines real-time telemetry from multiple charging networks with vehicle telematics to dynamically forecast adaptive ranges and charging durations, directly elevating the in-car experience.
SELECT_STATION_MAP_DESC: Select a charging station from the map to plug in and initiate unified payment/charging.
PNC_OBJECTIVE_TITLE: Core Objective: EV Ecosystem Scalability & Customer Experience
PNC_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Scales the EV charging ecosystem by deploying secure ISO 15118 Plug & Charge. Auto-identifies the vehicle and authorizes charging and settlement cryptographically upon connection, streamlining payments and scaling network operations.
ISO_15118_SUB: Automatically identify the vehicle and authorise payment immediately upon plugging in the connector.
OCPP_MONITOR_SUB: Live Web-Socket messages exchanging between the Charging Point (CP) and Central System (CS)
OCPP_OBJECTIVE_TITLE: Core Objective: Workforce Productivity & Grid Resilience
OCPP_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Boosts workforce and operator productivity through standardized, remote OCPP 2.0.1 diagnostics. Simulates network outage fault recovery with a local memory backup queue and tests grid load throttling during peak demand spikes.
OFFLINE_CACHE_TITLE: Offline Messages Cached in Station Memory
OFFLINE_CACHE_DESC: The network link to the central system is down. The charging station is storing transaction updates locally in Flash memory and will sync automatically once network connectivity is restored.
ADD_FUNDS_SUB: Fund your unified wallet via simulated UPI or Credit/Debit Card.
ANALYTICS_OBJECTIVE_TITLE: Core Objective: Supply Chain Resilience & Manufacturing Efficiency
ANALYTICS_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Enhances supply chain resilience and manufacturing efficiency by tracking battery health (SoH). AI models evaluate electrode degradation patterns, generating digital battery passports that qualify cells for second-life grid storage reuse.
SOH_TRACKER_TITLE: State of Health (SoH) & Battery Lifecycle Tracker
SOH_TRACKER_SUB: Total power delivered in kWh across different networks
CHARGING_BY_PROVIDER_SUB: Distribution of charging sessions by provider
TOAST_PAYMENT_CANCELLED: Payment was cancelled by the user.
TOAST_PAYMENT_SIMULATING: Razorpay SDK unavailable. Simulating Razorpay test payment...
TOAST_RZP_KEY_INVALID: Razorpay Checkout failed with 401. Please paste your valid Test Key ID from the Razorpay Dashboard.
TOAST_GRID_WARNING: Grid capacity warning! Substation load-shedding activated.
TOAST_GRID_NORMALIZED: Grid load normalized. Charging limits restored.
TOAST_SELECTED_STATION: Selected station: {{name}}. Pre-authorization initiated via ISO 15118.
LOG_PHYSICAL_CABLE: Physical cable connection detected. Connector type: {{connector}}. Locking connector...
LOG_TLS_SECURE: Secure TLS channel established. Contract Certificate Valid.
LOG_CONTRACT_VERIFIED: Contract Verified. ISO 15118 authentication successful. Payment pre-authorized.
TOAST_WALLET_LOW: Unified Wallet balance too low to authorize transaction.
LOG_TX_STARTED: OCPP Energy Transaction started. Relays closed. Energizing...
LOG_TX_ENDED: Relays open. Charger de-energized. Please unplug the connector.
LOG_NETWORK_RECOVERED: Network link recovered. Synchronizing cached telemetry with Central Management System...
LOG_NETWORK_WARNING: WARNING: Web-Socket link disconnected. Local transaction recovery buffer initiated.
LOG_GRID_THROTTLE: Smart Grid Command: Local charging output throttled to 70kW due to substation load-shedding.
LOG_GRID_NORMAL: Smart Grid Recovery: Grid load normalized. Restoring maximum port capacity.
TOAST_NETWORK_LOST: Network connection lost. Offline buffer enabled.
LOG_CACHE_SYNCED: Offline cache synchronization complete. Network status fully aligned.
TOAST_RESET_SENT: Sending remote OCPP Hard Reset command...
LOG_RESET_INIT: Initiating Charger Hard Reset. Halting transactions...
LOGIN_SUBTITLE: Enter the Next Gen EV Charging Control Hub
MAP_OBJECTIVE_DESC: Removes network fragmentation barriers to accelerate EV ecosystem scalability. Unifies independent charge point operators (Tata Power, Zeon, ChargeZone, Bolt) into a single map and routing view, optimizing grid charger utilisation.
TOAST_LOC_SYNC_SUCCESS: Location synchronized successfully! Real-time petrol pumps updated.
TOAST_LOC_DENIED: Location access denied. Please enable browser location permissions.
TOAST_GEOLOCATION_NOT_SUPPORTED: HTML5 Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
TOAST_LOCATION_NOT_FOUND: Location not found. Please try a different query.
TOAST_SEARCH_FAILED: Search failed. Please verify your connection.
TOAST_CLICK_MAP_COORDS: Click on the map to capture coordinates
TOAST_FILL_FIELDS_CORRECTLY: Please fill all required fields correctly.
TOAST_ACCEPT_TERMS: You must accept all terms and certify specifications to proceed.
NO_TX_MATCH: No transactions match the selected criteria.
TOAST_ADMIN_ONLY: Only Admin users are authorized to switch active perspectives.

AI_COPILOT_SUBTITLE_OPERATOR: Grid forecasting, load balancer advisories, and charger maintenance alerts

INSIGHT_CARD_LOW_FUNDS_DESC: Wallet balance (₹{{balance}}) is low. Top up now to prevent charging session authentication failure.
AGENT_VOLTADVISOR_SPECIALTY: Vehicle range optimization, battery health tips, and route coordination.
AGENT_VOLTADVISOR_WELCOME: Hello! I am VoltAdvisor, your EV Smart Companion. I can help optimize your driving range, analyze battery health, or coordinate routes. How can I assist you today?
AGENT_GRIDGUARDIAN_SPECIALTY: OCPP telemetry monitor, network load analysis, and grid peak demand forecasting.
AGENT_GRIDGUARDIAN_WELCOME: Welcome to NOC Command. I am GridGuardian, your OCPP & Grid Analyst. Ask me about active charging speeds, grid peak demand, or current OCPP message logs.
AGENT_BMS_SPECIALTY: Electrochemical state-of-health analysis, cell temperature profiling, and cycle diagnostics.
AGENT_BMS_WELCOME: Diagnostics online. I am your BMS Stress Expert. Ask me to run a cell health check, evaluate cycle count, or analyze state-of-health degradation trends.

AI_RESP_GENERIC_DEFAULT: I am available to answer your queries regarding the VoltStream EV ecosystem.
AI_RESP_VOLT_RANGE: Based on your live telemetry, your vehicle's Battery SoC is currently **{{vehicleSoc}}%**, providing an estimated remaining range of **{{estimatedRange}} km**. Pre-conditioning the battery pack and routing through urban streets instead of highways can increase efficiency by up to **8%** (adding roughly **{{addedRange}} km**).
AI_RESP_VOLT_TIPS:
Here are three crucial tips to maximize your EV battery life:
1. **Rule of 20-80**: Avoid letting your State of Charge (SoC) drop below 20% or sit above 80% for long durations.
2. **Limit DC Fast Charging**: While convenient, frequent ultra-fast charging creates localized heat stress. Use AC chargers when parking overnight.
3. **Cooling off**: Avoid charging immediately after aggressive driving; let the thermal management system stabilize the battery cells first.
AI_RESP_VOLT_CHARGER:
We have mapped 5 static stations and dynamic Overpass EV hubs around your current location (centered at Sheraton Grand Bengaluru Whitefield, lat 12.9839, lng 77.7523). 
The nearest available station is **Shell Recharge (Prestige Shantiniketan)**. It is **Available** and equipped with a **DC 150kW CCS2** connector, with a price of **₹18.00/kWh**. Just tap it on the Map tab to start routing!

AI_RESP_BMS_TEMP:
High battery temperatures (>45°C) during ultra-fast DC charging can speed up solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) layer growth. 
VoltStream BMS dynamically throttles charging rate when temperature exceeds **42°C**. Safety trip occurs at **50°C**. Currently cell temperature is normal at **38.5°C**.
